text.content:
The harbor district is the beating heart of Troubled Waters: three piers, a customs house, and more rumors per square foot than anywhere else in town.

All harbor business runs through @UUID[Compendium.troubled-waters-content.actors.Actor.bdf4e7b7dcdf7ae4]{Harbormaster Vela}. Nothing docks, loads, or leaves without her ledger knowing.

• A crate on Pier Two is registered to a ship that sank last spring.
  • Vela pays quietly for word of any vessel flying no flag after dark.
